dealSummary: Panthalassa, a startup focused on producing renewable energy from ocean waves, raised a $140 million Series B led by Peter Thiel.
Reserv, which provides third-party administration software for the insurance industry, received a $125 million Series C led by KKR.
Biotech startup Latus Bio secured a $97 million Series A from investors including 8VC, DCVC Bio and BioAdvance.
Italy-based Smartness, a travel software specialist, raised a €47 million Series B led by United Ventures and CDP Venture Capital.
Anello Photonics, which focuses on navigation technology for autonomous systems, received a $25 million Series B-2 led by MESH.
Home health platform developer Enzo Health secured a $20 million Series A led by N47.
UK-based biotech company EnteroBiotix, which focuses on microbiome therapies, raised a £19 million round led by Thairm Bio and the Scottish National Investment Bank.
leadInvestors: Thairm Bio, the Scottish National Investment Bank

dealSummary: India-based coffee chain Blue Tokai is raising a $19 million Series D led by Anicut Capital, Entrackr reported.
